title: sample_sfs_v1 — folded 1-D site frequency spectrum for one sample
description: Output of `realSFS -fold 1` for a single per-sample SAF file. The on-disk format is a single whitespace-separated line of two values: bin0_count, bin1_count (ML expectations under the folded SFS). The extractor (extract_sfs_ml_v1) reads this line and emits the object shape below. One file per sample; ~226 files total. Tier=warm/explicit because per-sample SFS is only fetched when a sample-detail panel asks for it.

sample.description: CGA-prefixed sample id, derived from the filename stem (<sample>.est.ml → sample).

bin0.description: Folded-SFS bin 0 = expected count of monomorphic sites (ML estimate).

bin1.description: Folded-SFS bin 1 = expected count of singleton/heterozygous sites (ML estimate).

n_total.description: Convenience field = bin0 + bin1. Optional; the extractor populates it for callers that want a denominator without re-summing.

het.description: Convenience field = bin1 / (bin0 + bin1). Optional; matches the value in samples_genomewide_het_v1.het_genomewide.
